name: ir_extract_content
description: Extract readable content from any investor relations document URL. Handles SEC Archives HTML filings (up to 15 MB) via direct streaming. Supports optional query to focus content extraction.

url.description: URL of the IR document to extract content from

query.description: Optional: focus the extracted content on this topic (e.g., 'revenue guidance', 'capital allocation')

section.description: For SEC 10-K/10-Q filings: specific section to extract

examples.description: Extract content from annual report URL
Extract MD&A section from SEC 10-K filing
